description: The layout of the add transaction form needs adjustment. The 'Scanning Receipt' element should be at the top, and the 'Expenses/Income slider' should be moved to the bottom.
fix: Reorder components in TransactionForm.tsx to place scanning at the top and the type slider at the bottom.

description: The Pie Chart is too small, and its legend (key) is external. The chart should occupy 75-85% of its container, and the legend should be moved inside the chart's div.
fix: Modify PieChart2D.tsx to increase the outerRadius/size and move the Legend component or custom key inside the main container.

description: Currency tags are inconsistent (Analytics shows only TZS), and the app is limited to INR and TZS. It needs to support a wider range of global currencies.
fix: Implement a more robust currency system. Update Dashboard.tsx and all components to support a list of major currencies (USD, EUR, GBP, etc.) and ensure consistent symbol rendering across all pages.

description: The password visibility toggle (eye icon) on Login and Register pages does not work because the input type is hardcoded to 'password' and doesn't switch to 'text' when toggled.
fix: Update input type in LoginPage.tsx and RegisterPage.tsx to be dynamic: type={showPassword ? 'text' : 'password'}.

description: Users need a way to explicitly sync/upload their data to the cloud to ensure it's available across multiple devices.
fix: Add a 'Sync to Cloud' button in the header and a dedicated Cloud Backup management section in Settings. Implement a visual feedback system for sync status (Last Synced timestamp).

issue: 404 on Root Route (/) in Dev Mode
description: In development (`npm run dev`), / returns Express 404 instead of index.html + React app. Vite middleware serves /src/main.tsx but not root static index.html. Turso config fine.
fix: Add `app.use(express.static('.'));` before `app.use(vite.middlewares)` in dev block of server.ts. Restart dev server. Prod ok (static dist).
